title: Sev's Netherite Expansion
description: A mod that aims to expand Netherite Progression with various upgrades to Netherite and two extremely expensive food items.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5961ab0eab20fc5ae439ea9e7a646d45f9a5e741.png)
This Mod aims to expand upon the Netherite progression of Minecraft by adding powerful tiers of upgrades to the rare Nether material that can be obtained at various stages of the game.
Additionally adds two VERY expensive food items for you to flex your Netherite riches.

**JEI is heavily recommended.**
**Vanilla Friendly BUT intended to be used alongside mods that add more difficult enemies and/or threats to your game.**

**UPGRADES**

Powered Netherite -> Crafted with the concentrated power of Redstone provides slightly higher defense compared to base Vanilla Netherite and also provides **Speed 1 and Haste 1**

Chorus Steel Netherite -> Crafted with both Overworld and The End dimension's ingredients  provides a larger defense boost, alongside **Haste 1, Speed 2, Night Vision, and Absorption 2.**

Sculk Infested Netherite -> Crafted using drops from the powerful Warden found in Ancient Cities, provides EXTREMELY large defensive bonuses, alongside **Haste 2, Speed 3, Night Vision, Resistance 1, Strength 3, and Health Boost 2**

**FOOD ITEMS**

Netherite Sandwich -> Extremely High-Cost but High-Nutritional and Saturation Values, **Grants Amplified Enchanted Golden Apple Effects.**

Netherite Dipped Golden Carrot -> Very High-Cost, but Very High Nutritional and Saturation Values, **Grants Night Vision** 
 
**RECIPES**

**CHECK GALLERY FOR IMAGES**

**MOD MADE PRIMARILY FOR USE IN THE TGGC SMP MODPACK**

**Can I use it on my own packs?**
As long as you credit the Mod then feel free to use it in your packs!

**DO NOT DISTRIBUTE WITHOUT PERMISSION**

Future Updates may include more tiers of upgrades, advancements, and re-sprites of certain items.
